features.name: wide signal multi-bit slice assignment
features.description: Code should include a multi-bit slice assignment to a wire wider than 32 bits, where the slice starts at a bit position >= 32

features.name: concatenation assignment of multi-bit slices
features.description: Code should include an assignment to a concatenation of two multi-bit slices from different source signals

features.name: sequential partial assignments to wide signal
features.description: Code should include multiple sequential assignments to different non-overlapping slices of the same wide signal

features.name: wide signal assignment from conditional expression
features.description: Code should include a conditional assignment to a slice of a wide signal, where the signal is wider than 32 bits
